prestazioni: Engine swap to a modernized M198 supercharged inline-6 (original SSK engine code) with a custom-built Roots-type supercharger upgrade using a Sprintex 210AX supercharger (2.1L/rev) running 12 psi of boost, paired with a custom billet crankshaft from Mahle Motorsport and forged aluminum pistons by JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio for high-octane fuel compatibility).

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a ZF 5-speed dog-engagement sequential gearbox (Type 5DS25-1) mated to a Sachs Performance twin-disc carbon clutch (240mm diameter) and a custom 8.5-inch limited-slip differential with a 4.11:1 final drive ratio from Quaife Engineering.

Custom fuel and ignition system featuring dual Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pumps, 1,000cc ID1000 injectors, and a standalone Motec M150 ECU with individual cylinder tuning, paired with a custom 1.5-inch stainless steel equal-length exhaust manifold by Schrick and a straight-pipe exhaust system with a 3-inch diameter and a Scavenger X-pipe for optimized scavenging.
estetica: Full custom bodywork restoration using lightweight aluminum panels (1.5mm thickness) by RML Group, featuring a hand-beaten aluminum front splitter with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling and a rear diffuser with carbon fiber strakes by Vorsteiner.

Custom interior overhaul with a full Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards by Saddleback Leather, Recaro SPG-K seats with custom SSK embroidery, and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub and a bespoke SSK logo inlay.

Bespoke wire-spoke wheels by Borrani (18x5 front, 18x7 rear) with custom offset for modern tire fitment (215/45R18 front, 245/40R18 rear) by Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2, paired with a custom air suspension system by Air Lift Performance with 3P management for adjustable ride height.
